notes: Major telemetry expansion (~19 to ~95 SDK channels): suspension & attitude, raw inputs & FFB torque, tire wear (3 points) and temps, per-wheel brake pressure, FFB clipping, native lap deltas, plus weather and CarSetup per stint and rig (wheel/pedals) detection. RPM now at 30Hz and the long-accel (al to gy) fix. Additive: older laps are unaffected.
notas: Grande expansao de telemetria (~19 para ~95 canais do SDK): suspensao e atitude, inputs crus e torque de FFB, desgaste de pneu (3 pontos) e temperaturas, pressao de freio por roda, clipping de FFB, deltas nativos de volta, alem de clima e CarSetup por stint e deteccao do rig (volante/pedais). RPM agora a 30Hz e o fix da aceleracao longitudinal (al para gy). Aditivo: voltas antigas ficam intactas.
